title: 4 x 40" (100CM) Bungee Cords with Hooks, Binswloo Heavy Duty Elasticated Shock Cords Luggage Straps for Securing Outdoor Tarps Tents Camps Garden Furniture, All Black, 1M Long
features: Long Bungie Cords: We believe in quality matters more than quanity, 4 pack of 40 inches/1M all black bungee cords in length (including hooks). Come with a polyester storage bag for easy keep.
No Smell: Well made from quality latex core and double braided rope, away from unpleasant chemical smell.
Sturdy & Stretchy: Bunjee cord hooks have a tensile force of 30KG; stretch up to double its original length.
Twine Wire Hooks Featured: Selected quality doubled wire hook makes our bunjees less likely to bend/break and scratch things.
Widely Used: Bungi cords are perfect for outdoor use to secure tarps, camps, tents, canopies and more. It assists with holding, tying down, securing, carrying, grabbing.
description: Product Description A quick and easy solution for securing items into place, without having to tie a knot. So many genius ways to use bungee cords for all your travel, yard work, cargo, camping, home storage needs and more. An essential tool for securing cargo and loads on cars, trucks, trailers, RVs, motorcycles, bikes Keep Trash Bags Secure, Prevent Grocery Bag Spills, etc. Perfect elastic band for securing tarpaulins.
